why_now: The post-cooldown StackOverflow run is already scheduled for 2026-05-24T11:30:00+02:00.
The current lane was still burning Stack Exchange quota after finding the same strong unanswered candidate.
Reducing avoidable quota burn is the strongest same-run repair that improves the odds of a real post-cooldown execution without repeating a handoff packet.

summary: Added an early-exit quota guard so the lane stops searching once it finds a strong unanswered or reusable StackOverflow candidate.
Reused recent-draft knowledge during the search phase so the lane can preserve quota for the live scheduled attempt instead of rediscovering the same packet.
Added a regression test that proves the search loop stops after the first strong candidate.

expected_outcome: The scheduled 2026-05-24 11:30 CEST StackOverflow run should reach the existing high-intent candidate without wasting quota on lower-priority searches.
replacement_condition: If the scheduled run still cannot produce a real StackOverflow action after this quota repair, stop iterating on the same packet and switch the next demand-capture slot to a different executable high-intent lane.
